# RDU HeatWave

> A premium Raleigh-Durham chapter of the 212 Referral Network. Focuses on referral gamification, steam scores, bizchats, and high-degree professional networking at Clouds Brewing in Raleigh, NC.

## Fast facts
- Chapter: RDU HeatWave (212 Referral Network)
- Location: Clouds Brewing, 1233 Front St, Raleigh, NC 27609
- Meeting time: Weekly on Wednesday mornings
- Primary focus: High-performance business networking using the extra degree philosophy.
- Core metrics: Steam Score, Gratitude Incentive (GI) points, BizChats.
- Venue partner: Clouds Brewing Raleigh
- Website: https://rduheatwave.team

## Public pages
- Home / Onboarding: https://rduheatwave.team/
- Meeting Lobby: https://rduheatwave.team/meet
- Visitor Info: https://rduheatwave.team/visit
- About Chapter: https://rduheatwave.team/about
- Privacy Policy: https://rduheatwave.team/privacy
